pr_title: fix: relax option count validator, raise review min_length, clean up dead code
pr_description: Change `check_option_count` from `len(v) != 3` to `len(v) < 3` — allows over-generation (>3 options), rejects under-generation Fix docstring run reference: run 89 → run 82 (llama, gta_game) where the 2-option bug was actually observed Raise `review_lever` `min_length` from 20 to 50 chars — catches stub reviews like the 19-char "Sensor Data Sharing" from run 89 parasomnia Strip dead-code examples from `LeverCleaned.review` field description (confirmed never serialized to LLM) Add template-lock migration pattern to `OPTIMIZE_INSTRUCTIONS` — documents that replacing copyable openers can shift weaker models to copying subphrases within the new examples
